architecture: Data flow per resource: src/api/{resource}.ts (data) -> handler.tsx (logic hook) -> index.tsx (view).
Data layer uses TanStack Query hooks (useCustomQuery / useMutation wrappers).
Keep view (index.tsx) dumb; put state, effects, and handlers in handler.tsx.
Server state via react-query; do not duplicate it into local state.
conventions: Always `return res` from service calls so backend messages reach the toast.
Use useConfirm for: delete, icon-only actions, auto-save, and exiting a dirty form (not for labeled create/update buttons).
Global search: one debounced (500ms) server-side search per list-with-detail, `keyword` param, reset to page 1 on change.
Avoid stale results: put every query param into the react-query queryKey.
Tables have 3 shapes: server paginated (skip/take), small non-paginated (pageCount: -1), infinite (useInfiniteQuery).
Form validation via React Hook Form: title <= 100 chars, description <= 250, trim inputs, show Field.ErrorText.
Permission-gate actions with CASL ability.can(action, subject).
lint: Run the project ESLint config; fix warnings within the changed scope.
Prefer early-return and switch-case over deep nesting; use enums over magic strings.
TypeScript strict: no implicit any; define a Props interface/type per component.
templates: scaffold-data: copy an existing src/api/{resource}.ts — types + service + react-query hooks.
scaffold-screen list: table + debounced global search + filter + pagination, split into index.tsx (view) and handler.tsx (logic).
scaffold-screen dialog: create/edit form with RHF validation, useConfirm on dirty-exit, `return res`.
design-system: Use the internal design system (@ghm) components: Dialog/Portal, BaseSelect/MultiCombobox, FileUpload, Field.
Combobox: createListCollection with itemToValue/itemToString; form values are arrays of ids.
Dialog kinds: view-only, form, delete-confirm, drawer (note the Tailwind v4 `transform-none!` override quirk).
Styling with Tailwind; do not hardcode colors — use design tokens/classes.
library-docs: Read docs/reference/libraries/ (README index + per-lib .md) before using any library.
The library index marks usage status (used / CSS-only / transitive / installed-but-unused) — trust it, do not invent APIs.
Key libs: tanstack-react-query, tanstack-react-table, react-hook-form, casl, react-router-dom, i18next, exceljs.
